pr.title: Non-record: MLX prototyping harness with validated technique stack (val_bpb=1.9588, Mac)

output.summary: Mac MLX prototype validates KV2/GQA blocks with Int6 quant, FP16 embeddings, Muon WD, and sliding eval for compact 16MB leaderboard targets.
techniques: KV2/GQA architecture plus sliding-window eval harness
Int6 per-row quantization with FP16 tied embeddings and Muon weight decay
Multi-eval validation harness for 25+ MLX technique sweeps
